metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for the Oracle AI Data Platform Fusion Bundle Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: oracle-ai-data-platform-fusion-bundle
plugins.description: Productized Fusion → AIDP pipeline: curated BICC extracts, medallion bronze/silver/gold, conformed dimensions, gold marts, and MCP-native OAC workbook authoring. Legacy .bar OAC REST install remains available for snapshot deployments.
